message:
fix(mux): fix reversed scroll, Shift+key input, and transfer init crash

- Fix reversed scroll direction: negate browser deltaX/deltaY before
  sending to ghostty (browser positive=down, ghostty positive=up)
- Fix scroll speed: send precision flag from browser so ghostty treats
  pixel-mode deltas (trackpad) correctly instead of multiplying by cell
  height
- Fix Shift+letter not producing uppercase: set consumed_mods to include
  Shift when text is produced, so ghostty's effectiveMods() doesn't
  treat Shift as an active modifier for encoding
- Fix transfer init crash: use std.meta.intToEnum instead of
  @enumFromInt to gracefully handle invalid direction bytes
